name: Thunder Mail
description:
This +2 greater resilient greater electricity-resistant chain mail is adorned with two golden thunderbolts, one along each forearm. Even on a seemingly cloudless day, you can raise your arms to the heavens and draw down a bolt of lightning upon yourself, empowering your armor and blasting your enemies.

Activate—Call Down Lightning 1 (concentrate, electricity, manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You conjure a bolt of electricity down onto yourself, dealing |options:area-damage|traits:concentrate,electricity,manipulate] damage to all creatures in a . Additionally, for the next minute, whenever a creature touches you or hits you with a melee unarmed attack or a non-reach melee weapon attack, it takes |traits:concentrate,electricity,manipulate] damage.
